summary: Ported DagViewer.vue + useDagLayout.ts from fleet/dashboard. DUMB component contract: props { layout, tablet? } in, node-selected event out. No fetch, no state derivation. fleet-specific CSS vars given fallback values for cross-repo neutrality. Render contract per spec: takes typed dag layout, emits nodeSelected(id) — actually emits 'node-selected' (kebab) per Vue convention.

validation.evidence: grep -i 'fleet' viewer/src/components/DagViewer.vue viewer/src/composables/useDagLayout.ts → only in comment 'Ported from fleet/dashboard'
no fetch/import 'axios'/setTimeout/setInterval in DagViewer.vue script setup; props in events out
